name: @nemorouter/agent-widget
description: Zero-dependency embeddable Ask-AI chat widget for the Nemo Router agent gateway. Deployed separately (CDN/npm); talks to api.nemorouter.ai with your own sk-nemo key.

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js && esbuild src/embed.ts --bundle --global-name=NemoAgentWidget --outfile=dist/agent-widget.global.js && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --declaration --outDir dist
